subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #065 Faith and Works
subcodes.first_line: The meaning of this blessed verse is that the foundation of success and salvation is the recognition of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: از این آیهء مبارکه مقصد اینست که اساس فوز و فلاح عرفان حق است
subcodes.subjects: @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
